briefdescription.para: point can be in any place of surface
point can be only in face center
point can be only on edges
point can be only in edge center

detaileddescription.para: point can be only in vertex
creates control sphere in start pos returns updated pos if it was moved according to PositionType

briefdescription.para: resets whole widget
returns object of control sphere
get current setup of this widget
set parameters for this widget
set baseColor parameter for this widget

detaileddescription.para:
Update the widget parameters.
visitor
- the function that takes the widget parameters and modifies them. Then the parameters are applied by setParameters.
if auto hover is enabled, pick_render_object() is used !note: disabling it is useful if there are many widgets, not to call pick_render_object() for each of them separately
function for manual enable and disable hover mode use it if auto hover is disabled

briefdescription.para: returns stored position of this widget
return local object's coordinates at the current position where the center of sphere is located
return local object's coordinates at the current position, or std::nullopt if it is invalid
return the normal in local object's coordinates at the current position, or std::nullopt if it is invalid or normal is not defined
returns stored position as MeshTriPoint, otherwise returns invalid (default) MeshTriPoint
sets new position for the widget
sets new position for the widget
sets new position for the widget and returns previous position in the argument
this callback is called before modification starts if it is set, and can cancel it by returning false
this callback is called when modification starts if it is set
this callback is called on modification if it is set
this callback is called when modification ends if it is set
returns whether is the widget moving

detaileddescription.para: activates dragging of this widget; this method is called automatically on mouse down, but it can also be called manually, please be sure that mouse is over this widget and is down may return false if moving is forbidden by callback

memberdef.argsstring: (const std::shared_ptr< MR::VisualObject > &obj, const MR::PointOnObject &pick, const Vector3f &cameraEye)
memberdef.name: isPickIntoBackFace

briefdescription.para: Checks whether the current peak is a peak in the invisible (reverse) side of the mesh or cloud point.
Depending on the type of selected size, sets the point size.
set color of pick sphere from the current state and parameters
Widget for controlling point on surface with mouse.
